head: post-07033a1 + overdue-color-unify
scope: UX polish from live-site product audit (UI-only, 0 API/schema)
fixes_applied: /bookings: removed junk Название + empty Ждёт + duplicate Дата columns (7 cols, colSpan fixed); PENDING aging under pill
/bookings: status colors — distinct lifecycle variants; OVERDUE=alert(rose) vs PAID=ok(emerald) bad/good contrast

/bookings/[id]: 3-sums resolved — title sum removed, Finance block breakdown (Аренда->Скидка->after->Транспорт->finalAmount), смета marked '(только оборудование)' + cross-link; amber drift-detector banner if estimate+transport != finalAmount
/bookings/[id]: positions shown once (priced table, дубль смета-list removed)
/bookings/[id]: disabled Акт PDF tooltip+aria 'Акт доступен после возврата и закрытия долга'
follow-up: unified Просрочен color alert/rose between list and detail (was warn/amber on detail)

par_verdicts.technical: APPROVE — 0 CRIT/HIGH/MED/LOW; breakdown arithmetic verified vs recomputeBookingFinance (finance.ts:108-115); drift detector gated against NaN/false-trigger; no data loss; collapse preserves tests
par_verdicts.product: ACCEPTED — working scenarios preserved, 3-sums pain resolved & readable, 2 minor follow-ups (overdue color unify [fixed], date locale [non-issue])

backend_followup: Architectural fragility (not a bug): confirmBooking does not call recomputeBookingFinance; finalAmount sync relies on approve/payment paths. amber drift-detector now surfaces any future desync in UI. Separate backend sprint if desired.
